posts.cookedHtml:
I’m the monday.com training specialist @ Work Perfect. I’m hosting a FREE Foundation Training which covers the basics of monday.com this month (28th June 2023, 1 pm AEST)- join me if you’re looking for a basics course on monday.com!

Register using this link : WP Foundation Training Registration 2023
